runs.result:
{
  "a": [
    {
      "intent": "add checklist for full workflow from GOAL",
      "risk": "m",
      "action": {
        "k": "addNewTask",
        "afterCpId": 0,
        "checkPoints": [
          "login to email account with provided email and password",
          "identify and open the new order email in the email inbox",
          "read the new order email and extract all order details from it",
          "navigate to the pos system using the provided ordering platform url",
          "fill the create order form in the pos system with the extracted order details",
          "set the earliest possible delivery date in the create order form",
          "proceed to the preview order step in the pos system",
          "if the order amount is greater than 1000, capture a screenshot of the preview order",
          "go to the messager using the provided messager url",
          "send manager dillion the order file or order details and the screenshot in messager to seek his approval",
          "receive and review manager dillion's advice in messager",
          "apply and perform the actions advised by manager dillion regarding the order",
          "save the order in the pos system after following manager dillion's advice",
          "access the order list in the pos system and download the invoice for the order",
          "return to the email platform",
          "compose and send a reply email to the client including the order id, order details, and the invoice file as attachment"
        ],
        "permitFromGoal": "do what you can what you want, no botherUser",
        "src": "Initial breakdown of GOAL into actionable checkpoints",
        "taskRisk": "m"
      }
    }
  ],
  "next": {
    "tip": "Use provided credentials to log into the email platform sign-in form.",
    "sc": false
  }
}
